assumptionsNotes: Heuristic baseline profiles with a 4-char-per-token approximation for MCP payloads.

create-project-package-build.notes: Project creation + package add + build typically requires a small amount of discovery and one retry when package or template parameters are missing.

run-tests-summarize-failures.notes: Test failure workflows pay more parsing cost because raw output is verbose and failure triage is iterative.

scaffold-webapi-ef-setup.notes: Web API plus EF setup often includes template discovery, package selection, and user-secrets guidance.
